svg.title: GigShield Fraud Detection Flow
svg.desc: Flow diagram showing how GPS pings and weather data trigger a fraud engine that routes claims by risk score into auto-approve, grace queue, or syndicate block lanes.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does rider GPS ping work in GigShield?')
sendPrompt('Which weather APIs does GigShield use?')
sendPrompt('What does the GigShield trigger service do?')
sendPrompt('What does the GigShield FastAPI backend do?')
sendPrompt('How does the GigShield fraud engine work?')
sendPrompt('How does GigShield auto-approve a claim?')
sendPrompt('How does the GigShield grace queue work?')
sendPrompt('What happens when GigShield blocks a syndicate claim?')
